user_bio: I'm Dhaval Variya, an AI & Software Engineer with a passion for clean code and workflow automation. I leverage my expertise in Python, Node.js, and DevOps tools like n8n and Docker to build efficient microservices and CI/CD pipelines. I have a proven track record of using REST APIs to automate processes and reduce manual data workloads by up to 90%. I love combining AI integration (OpenAI/LangChain) with n8n to build smarter, time-saving workflows.
